case_title: CHRIS K. KIM VS. PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, CHRIS K. AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, CHRIS K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT THE DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S VESSEL WAS AN INSURED LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KIM, CHRIS K. AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-01-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
